message:
feat: restore telemetry CLI subcommands after bd sync issue

- Restore dcg telemetry command with subcommands:
  - status: Show database status and outcome breakdown
  - recent: Show recent commands with pagination
  - blocks: Show recently blocked commands
  - search: Full-text search via FTS5
  - project: Filter by project directory
  - query: Raw SQL query (SELECT only)
- Add integration tests for telemetry CLI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
